about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn about Dijital Enderun
about.missionText: To contribute to the professional development of students, academics, and public servants by offering high-quality, up-to-date and accessible educational content in the field of political science and public administration; to spread knowledge in the field by leveraging the possibilities of the digital age.
about.visionText: To be Turkey's most trusted digital knowledge source in political science and public administration; to lead the digital transformation of the field by bridging students, academics and public servants.
about.description1: Dijital Enderun is a digital platform founded in 2023 that brings together undergraduate and graduate students studying political science and public administration, academics working in this field, and public servants serving in public institutions and organizations.
about.description2: With Dijital Enderun, we aim to create a platform equipped with the necessities of the digital age we live in, where students, academics and public servants can benefit from, exchange knowledge and ideas, and produce content related to the field using alternative social media channels.
about.studentsDesc: Undergraduate and graduate students studying political science and public administration.
about.academicsDesc: Academics and researchers working in this field.
about.publicServantsDesc: Public servants serving in public institutions and organizations.
about.contentDesc: SBKY and legislation lecture notes, current resources, educational materials and exam preparation content.
about.currentInfoDesc: Real-time tracking of Official Gazette announcements, job postings and legislation changes.
about.exchangeDesc: Content production and mutual interaction related to the field through social media channels.

footer.aboutText: Founded in 2023, Dijital Enderun is a digital platform that brings together students, academics and public servants in the field of political science and public administration.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy & GDPR
privacy.subtitle: Protection of personal data and terms of use
privacy.generalText1: Dijital Enderun (dijitalenderun.org) is a digital platform that provides educational content in the field of political science and public administration. This privacy policy explains how the personal data of users visiting our website is collected, processed, and protected.
privacy.generalText2: This policy has been prepared in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and relevant data protection legislation.
privacy.dataIntro: Our website collects personal data in the following cases:
privacy.dataContactText: Full name, email address, subject and message content — collected solely for the purpose of communicating with you.
privacy.dataGaText: Anonymous visitor statistics (page views, device type, browser information, geographic location, etc.) — collected for the purpose of improving the website. This data does not contain personally identifiable information.
privacy.dataVercelText: Anonymous performance and usage data — collected for the purpose of improving site speed and usability.
privacy.dataNote: Our website does not use a membership system or payment infrastructure. Sensitive personal data such as credit card numbers or national ID numbers are not collected under any circumstances.
privacy.cookieIntro: Our website uses cookies to improve user experience and analyze visitor statistics:
privacy.cookieEssentialText: Technical cookies necessary for the proper functioning of the website.
privacy.cookieAnalyticsText: Used by Google Analytics and Vercel Analytics for anonymous statistical data collection.
privacy.cookieAdsText: May be used by Google AdSense for interest-based advertising.
privacy.cookieNote: You can disable cookies through your browser settings. However, some site features may be limited in this case.
privacy.securityItem1: Is stored on secure servers (with SSL/TLS encryption).
privacy.securityItem2: Is not shared with third parties for commercial purposes and is not sold.
privacy.securityItem3: May only be shared with authorized public institutions in cases of legal obligation.
privacy.securityItem4: May be processed by service providers (Vercel, Supabase, Google) solely within the scope of technical infrastructure.
privacy.ipText: All content on the Dijital Enderun platform (lecture notes, articles, images, videos, design and software) is protected under applicable intellectual property laws.
privacy.ipItem1: Content may only be used for personal and educational purposes.
privacy.ipItem2: Unauthorized copying, reproduction, distribution or commercial use of content is prohibited.
privacy.ipItem3: Quotations without citing the source constitute copyright infringement.
privacy.ipItem4: When sharing content on other platforms, "dijitalenderun.org" must be cited as the source.
privacy.ipItem5: The right to initiate legal proceedings in case of infringement is reserved.
privacy.rightsIntro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights:
privacy.rightsItem1: The right to know whether your personal data is being processed
privacy.rightsItem2: The right to request information about processed data
privacy.rightsItem3: The right to know the purpose of processing and whether data is used in accordance with that purpose
privacy.rightsItem4: The right to know third parties to whom your data has been transferred domestically or abroad
privacy.rightsItem5: The right to request correction if data has been processed incompletely or incorrectly
privacy.rightsItem6: The right to request deletion or destruction of your data under the conditions stipulated by law
privacy.rightsItem7: The right to object to any adverse outcome arising from the analysis of processed data exclusively through automated systems
privacy.contactText: For requests regarding your personal data or inquiries about content rights, you can reach us at the following email address:
